}}

{{nihongo|'''Hachiman Shrine (Otoi)'''|八幡神社 (伊豆市小土肥)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Q11390939|ltq=Q11390939|qid=Q11390939|1=Hachiman shrine}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11380552|ltq=Q11380552|qid=Q11380552|1=List of Shikinaisha in Izu Province}}
** Series ordinal: 88
** P155: {{ill|Q119929626|ltq=Q119929626|qid=Q119929626|1=Toi Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Kamuheno Shrine|lt=Kamuheno Shrine|qid=Q135039684|1=Kamuheno Shrine}}

== Japanese content ==

|??   = Hachiman Shrine

|??? = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Izu|Q696840|qid=Q696840|1=Izu, Shizuoka}} Odoi 707

|??   = {{ill|lt=Emperor ?jin|Q317997|qid=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}}
|??   = former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}?{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}

}}
'''Hachiman Shrine''' (????????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Odoi, {{ill|lt=Izu|Q696840|qid=Q696840|1=Izu, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402056 Hachiman Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is in the eastern inland area of Odoi at the northern end of the T?i district (former {{ill|lt=T?i Town|Q3530413|qid=Q3530413|1=Toi, Shizuoka}}) in Izu City, along Prefectural Route 17 (Numazu-T?i Line).

Its founding is unknown, but it is identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} "Aotama-hime-no-Mikoto Shrine" and is an old shrine also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087|qid=Q17193087|1=Izu no kuni jinjaich?}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Aotama-hime no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/hatiman4_title.htm Hachiman Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140321-01.html Hachiman Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

It was ranked as a village shrine in Meiji 6 ({{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|qid=Q7757|1=1873}})<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|lt=Emperor ?jin|Q317997|qid=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}}

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}
